metadata.description: Clean scoring audit with only objective scoring fields

config.final_total_rule: Per project, compute each judge weighted score, drop exactly one highest and one lowest, average the remaining values, round to 2 decimals
config.dimension_average_rule: Per dimension, drop exactly one highest and one lowest among judge raw scores, average the remaining values, round to 2 decimals
